patch:
# ShipGuard Auto-Fix Patch
# Generated: 2026-02-20T14:36:12.000Z
# Total suggestions: 3

# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Fix 1/3: env-missing-example
# File: .env.example
# Description: Create .env.example template from existing .env file
# Auto-apply: YES
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

--- /dev/null	2026-02-20 14:36:12
+++ b/.env.example	2026-02-20 14:36:12
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+# Environment Variables Template
+# Copy this file to .env and fill in your values
+
+DATABASE_URL=your_database_url_here
+STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=YOUR_STRIPE_SECRET_KEY_HERE
+REDIS_URL=your_redis_url_here
+PORT=your_port_here
+NODE_ENV=your_node_env_here
+JWT_SECRET=YOUR_JWT_SECRET_HERE

suggestions.description: Create migration note for 3 file(s) with excessive console.log usage
Remove EXPOSE 5432 (PostgreSQL) from Dockerfile - use internal networking
